data.acceptance:
1. A real execution_plan knot exists in Foolery for spec:foolery/Specs/Spec - Grooming to Execution Plan.md.
2. The plan knot carries the slice:all tag and every generated work knot carries the spec tag plus exactly one slice tag.
3. Generated or referenced work knots are connected to the plan knot with planned_by edges.
4. The existing Slice 3 knots foolery-fec0, foolery-27fe, foolery-0dee, foolery-4d52, foolery-4e28, and foolery-a873 are reparented into the reviewed hierarchy instead of recreated.
